creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm aware of it.

Please note that porting ice is a lot of work - 3.5 and especially 3.6 took a long time and I found a couple of bugs on the way (some FreeBSD specific and some multi platform). So porting this will take a while.

I also plan to split off 3.6, so that we will end up with devel/ice36 and devel/ice37 or something like this, as the transition from one version to the other isn't always smooth (especially now as there are two C++ language mappings available).

Again, 3.6 had a few catastrophic bugs, so I want to make sure to make this slow and optional.
